title: carex × incurva subsp. deinbolliana
intro: Carex × incurva subsp. deinbolliana, also known as Deinbolli's curved sedge, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Carex, characterized by its unique curved or bent leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, with its roots and rhizomes believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Deinbolli's curved sedge are thought to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
